narrative:
Cols 65-B (precinct in Franklin County) has 693 registered voters, with 51.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 26.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 21.6%, a modest Republican lean of 4.9 percentage points.
